name: Muhammad Mudasir
title: Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer
summary:
Results-driven Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer with a strong expertise in building scalable, high-performance web applications and intelligent systems using modern technologies such as .NET Core, React, Next.js, Angular, and Python. Proven ability to design and develop end-to-end solutions that seamlessly combine robust backend architecture with visually compelling, user-centric frontend experiences.

Award-winning innovator in AI competitions, recognized for delivering creative, impactful, and real-world solutions through advanced problem-solving and technical excellence. Experienced in integrating AI/ML capabilities into applications to enhance automation, performance, and user engagement.

Passionate about continuous learning, clean code, and cutting-edge technologies, with a strong commitment to creating future-ready digital products that solve complex problems and drive meaningful results in dynamic, fast-paced environments.

experience.description: Designed and developed responsive, user-centric web applications using modern frameworks including React, .NET Core, and Laravel. Integrated AI/ML capabilities using TensorFlow and PyTorch for enhanced functionality. Managed end-to-end project lifecycle from requirement analysis to deployment.

education.details: Focus on Full Stack Development. Technologies: .NET Core, Angular, SQL Server, Cloud Computing.
